positive: Central, stylized illustration of a majestic cosmic fox silhouette sitting amidst bioluminescent celestial flora. The fox is depicted with flowing, artistic lines and a calm, regal posture. The background features a nebula gradient of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and warm gold, accented by stylized, geometric constellations and abstract swirling smoke. High contrast, clean vector art style mixed with soft watercolor textures. Composition is balanced and centered, suitable for large apparel prints. Highly detailed, symmetrical, elegant, vaporwave meets mystical forest magic. --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6.0
negative: blurry, noisy, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, childish, cartoon, ugly, cluttered, realistic photo, low contrast
